---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

Thank you for visiting my E-portfolio. I am open to opportunities related to **marketing**, **project management**, **business analytics**, and **data-driven strategy**.

If you would like to connect, collaborate, or discuss potential opportunities, please feel free to reach out.

---

::: {.contact-box}
## Let's Connect

📧 **Email:** [hhanaz0903@gmail.com](mailto:hhanaz0903@gmail.com)  

📱 **Phone:** 857-540-9193  

📍 **Location:** Boston, MA  

🔗 **LinkedIn:** [Tsyr-Rau Chen Hana](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tsyr-rau-chen-hana/?locale=en-US)
:::

---

## Areas of Interest

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Marketing

Digital marketing, content strategy, branding, consumer insights, and campaign analysis.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Project Management

Cross-functional coordination, planning, communication, and execution.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Business Analytics

Data analysis, visualization, reporting, and business decision support.
:::
:::

---

## Message Me

I am especially interested in opportunities where I can combine analytical thinking with creativity, communication, and business strategy.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[Send Email](mailto:hhanaz0903@gmail.com){.btn-primary}
[Visit LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tsyr-rau-chen-hana/?locale=en-US){.btn-secondary}
:::
